title: Fireside Chat #2 – Avalanche RESCUE – Dec 10th!!
summary: Join us again this winter for our wildly popular Fireside Chat series! Forecasters will present a different topic each night ranging from Human Factors to snowpack and avalanche formation. As always, these seminars will be fun, informative and free! Topic for tonight (Thursday, Dec 10th, 6:30-8:00pm...
